overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player walks along sidewalks, crosses a street, and ascends a multi-level outdoor staircase surrounded by holographic advertisements and towering glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: briefly look upward at the towering building architecture and overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, observing the futuristic street scene and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking toward camera on the sidewalk
futuristic green sports car driving along the street

entered.detail: tall building with geometric white structural beams and cyan neon accent lighting
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk in large planters
short posts with glowing cyan light strips separating sidewalk from street
elevated highway or pedestrian walkway crossing above the street with neon underlighting
large illuminated advertisement display on building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic city sidewalk at night, surrounded by towering glass buildings with cyan neon accents. Palm trees line the path while futuristic vehicles drive past on the left. The camera briefly looks up at the impressive architecture and elevated overpasses before continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and elevated walkways

events.description: step off sidewalk onto street crosswalk to cross the wide intersection
turn left while crossing to face the direction of the external staircase
futuristic black SUV drives past the crosswalk from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street intersection and turning toward the staircase on the far side

notable_agents.action: black futuristic SUV driving across the intersection

entered.detail: long concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to elevated walkway
smooth white facade with large illuminated advertisement poster

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as the camera crosses the street. A long external staircase becomes visible on the left, leading upward between buildings. The camera turns left while crossing, revealing more of the futuristic architecture and passing vehicles including a black SUV.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level outdoor staircase with neon signage and holographic billboards

events.description: begin ascending the long outdoor staircase
reach first landing and turn to continue ascending second flight

agents.ego_description: climbing the long outdoor staircase, passing other pedestrians going up and down between levels

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit descending the stairs toward camera
pedestrian in blue jacket ascending the stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'SEOCHO' text in bright white neon letters
large red billboard with Japanese text and graphic of a face
glowing purple and blue holographic display floating near buildings
elevated pedestrian bridge with glass railings connecting buildings
giant illuminated portrait of a face with sunglasses on building wall

segments.scene_description: Ascending a long outdoor staircase between tightly packed buildings covered in neon signage. The prominent 'SEOCHO' sign glows on the right while a large red Japanese billboard dominates the left. Other pedestrians pass by going in the opposite direction. The camera continues climbing past holographic advertisements toward an upper-level walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-lit city sidewalk into the dense, vertical corridors of a futuristic urban center. It begins by moving along a path lined with palm trees and towering glass buildings accented in cyan, briefly glancing up at elevated overpasses as vehicles stream past. As the camera reaches a wide intersection, the view opens up to cross the street, turning left to reveal a black SUV and a long external staircase nestled between the architecture. The scene then shifts from the open road to a narrow ascent, climbing the stairs past pedestrians and beneath a canopy of glowing neon signage. Finally, the camera rises past a prominent SEOCHO sign and a large red Japanese billboard, moving through holographic advertisements toward an upper-level walkway.
